title: carthamus helenioides
intro: Carthamus helenioides, also known as the false safflower or Greek false safflower, is a plant species in the sunflower family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible seeds. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Carthamus helenioides include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Carthamus helenioides can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried herb, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
